_notes_dev_pc.worker_policy: Use 6 JS eval workers by default. Use --workers 4 for background use or --workers 8 only when the PC is dedicated to training.
_notes_dev_pc.gpu_policy: runtime_phase1.json now enables native_inference_backend=auto so js_worker can offload NEAT forward passes to the Rust policy bridge and use CUDA when the model stays within the supported activation/sum-aggregation subset.
